description: Nevada DHHS: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2022 as adopted by Nevada.
citation: NAC 449.231 / Nevada Division of Public and Behavioral Health

description: Nevada DHHS: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear; two-bed rooms minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
Nevada DHHS: ICU cubicle minimum 150 sq ft; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
Nevada DHHS: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width.
Nevada DHHS: Surgical suites 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
Nevada DHHS: Nevada does not have a CON law. Hospital construction requires DPBH plan review and facility licensing approval.
citation: NRS 449 / Nevada — No Certificate of Need

description: Nevada DHHS: Las Vegas/Clark County metro hospitals must also comply with Clark County Building Department healthcare occupancy requirements in addition to state rules.
citation: Clark County Building Code — Healthcare Occupancy
